title: ครูดิวติว Grammar: Verb to Be คืออะไร? มีวิธีใช้ยังไง? สรุปจบในคลิปนี้เลย!
metadata: [1] KRU DEW A PARTWAY # BE is was been am were are [2] KRU DEW A PARTWAY 2. be + adj. ไม่ต้องแปล He is handsome. Are you sick? [3] 3. be + Ving แปลว่า กำลัง.... We are watching a movie. Is he doing the homework? [4] KRU DEW A PARTWAY 1. คุณกำลังกินข้าวเย็นป่าว Are you having dinner? 2. ฝนกำลังตำหนักมาตอนนี้ [5] The boss _______ a meeting at the moment. A. has B. will have C. is having [6] KRU DEW ing V.3 1. The books will be to other schools. A send V.1 B. sending C. sent
